task_completion.description: Verify that the baseline metrics CSV file is created with the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command like 'cat /home/ga/SUMO_Output/baseline_corridor_metrics.csv' or a text editor showing the file. It must contain 'metric,value' columns with rows for avg_travel_time_s, avg_waiting_time_s, avg_time_loss_s, and total_vehicles.

task_completion.description: Verify that the coordinated TLS additional XML file is created with adjusted offsets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the file '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/acosta_tls_coordinated.add.xml' open in an editor or printed in the terminal. It should contain <tlLogic> blocks with 'offset' attributes modified for at least 4 of the target TLS IDs (209, 210, 219, 220, 221, 235, 273).

task_completion.description: Verify that the coordinated SUMO configuration file is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the file '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/run_coordinated.sumocfg' open in an editor or printed in the terminal. It should reference the new 'acosta_tls_coordinated.add.xml' file in its <additional-files> section.

task_completion.description: Verify that the coordinated metrics CSV file is created with the results of the modified simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command like 'cat /home/ga/SUMO_Output/coordinated_corridor_metrics.csv' or a text editor showing the file. It must contain the same metrics as the baseline but with updated values reflecting the simulation run.

task_completion.description: Verify that the signal coordination report is produced with all required sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the file '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/signal_coordination_report.txt' open in an editor or printed in the terminal. It must include chosen offset values, rationale, before/after comparison of metrics, percentage improvements, and professional recommendations.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually ran the SUMO simulations to get the metrics.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output showing SUMO execution logs (e.g., 'sumo -c ...' or 'sumo-gui') and parsing scripts, rather than just manually typing out fake CSV files.

integrity.description: Verify that the coordinated metrics differ from the baseline metrics in a realistic way.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in coordinated_corridor_metrics.csv should not be identical to baseline_corridor_metrics.csv, and they should look like realistic simulation outputs (e.g., floating point numbers).

integrity.description: Verify that the report is based on actual calculated values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The percentage improvements and before/after comparisons in the report should mathematically match the values in the baseline and coordinated CSV files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The design speed for the corridor is exactly 13.89 m/s (50 km/h). The 7 targeted TLS IDs are 209, 210, 219, 220, 221, 235, and 273. Full credit for the TLS coordination requires modifying the 'offset' attribute for at least 4 of these 7 intersections in the acosta_tls_coordinated.add.xml file. All output files must be saved exactly to the paths specified in the task description.
